name: socialforge
description: Agency-grade social media calendar automation with asset-first compositing. Parse calendars, match brand assets, generate AI-composed creative, render carousels, adapt copy, produce review galleries. Multi-brand, multi-platform. **v1.6.0** adds end-to-end-tested C2PA content provenance for EU AI Act Article 50 compliance (applicable 2 Aug 2026): new scripts/c2pa_sign.py wrapping c2pa-python 0.32, new /socialforge:c2pa-sign skill, and optional auto-sign hook in generate_image.py + video_postprocess.py (post-generation step that embeds machine-readable provenance manifests with brand + generator + prompt + platform metadata before the asset hits delivery). Also: May 2026 channel-pack reference (TikTok USDS structure post-Jan 2026, LinkedIn March 2026 algorithm + Depth Score, Apple MPP B2C open-rate decline, Meta Advantage+, YouTube AI labeling), Sora deprecation note in engineering spec, README auto-update toggle guidance. v1.5 ships zero global hooks for clean multi-plugin coexistence — credential status now via /socialforge:status on demand. All 10 HTTP MCP connectors are Cowork-compatible.
